codeReview.summary: The feature mostly implements the requested auth gate, API-first contacts fetch, sidebar item, and tests, but the migrated bulk import path in useContacts drops API result/error information and can report successful imports when records fail server-side.

issues.description: bulkCreate() ignores the /api/contacts/bulk-import response payload and always returns [], while also swallowing request failures. This hides partial/full import failures from callers. The server returns per-item success/failed/error details (server/routes.ts:416-450), but callers show success toasts after await bulkCreate(...) (client/src/pages/contacts.tsx:792-793, client/src/components/import-modal.tsx:213-214), so UI can claim imports succeeded when they did not.

AuthGate has no error-state handling for non-401 /auth/me failures. If getQueryFn throws (e.g., 500/network error), user remains undefined and the component stays on LoadingScreen indefinitely instead of surfacing an error/retry path.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mission AGENTS.md appears stale about TypeScript baseline health and may cause workers to skip meaningful full typecheck verification.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Mission AGENTS.md says `npm run check` has 10 pre-existing errors (line 82), but this feature handoff records `npm run check` exitCode 0 with no errors (handoff ...a809a241...json lines 21-23).

sharedStateObservations.observation: frontend-worker skill procedure is rigid about RED-first and does not explicitly describe the inherited-worktree case where implementation already exists from a prior worker session.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Skill states `Write Tests First (RED)` (./.factory/skills/frontend-worker/SKILL.md:33). Handoff skillFeedback explicitly requests this nuance be documented for partially pre-implemented features (handoff ...a809a241...json lines 107-108).

summary: Review failed due to a blocking data-flow issue in migrated useContacts bulkCreate: API import result/failure information is discarded, enabling false-success UI messaging on failed imports.
